𝗦𝗨𝗣𝗘𝗥 | To provide a secure, user-friendly, and highly configurable WiFi router solution for home networks, enabling advanced network segmentation and security controls.  🔥 Super Hot!

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📜 JavaScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a secure, user-friendly, and highly configurable WiFi router solution for home networks, enabling advanced network segmentation and security controls.
📅 Created: Sep 2021 • Updated: May 2026

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ One Password Per WiFi Device
✅ Policy Based / Zero Trust Network Access
✅ Per-Device DNS Rules & Ad Block Lists
✅ Multi-PSK with WPA3
✅ Wireguard VPN
✅ Multi WAN with Load Balancing
✅ DNS over HTTPS
✅ React UX
✅ API Plugin System


▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 682 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 54 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 40 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

SPR is an open-source, user-friendly, and secure WiFi router solution designed for home networks. It offers advanced features like per-device WiFi passwords, policy-based network access, ad blocking, and granular DNS control, enhancing both security and privacy.

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/spr-networks/super

𝗖𝗢𝗗𝗘𝗕𝗨𝗥𝗡 | Observing and optimizing AI coding token expenditure by providing a detailed, local breakdown of usage across different AI tools and projects.  🔥 Super Hot!

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Observing and optimizing AI coding token expenditure by providing a detailed, local breakdown of usage across different AI tools and projects.
📅 Created: Apr 2026 • Updated: May 2026

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Tracks token usage, cost, and performance across 20+ AI coding tools
✅ Breaks down spending by task type, model, tool, project, and provider
✅ Runs locally, reading session data directly from disk
✅ Prices calls using LiteLLM
✅ Interactive TUI dashboard
✅ Provides optimization suggestions and comparison features
✅ Supports Cursor and OpenCode with optional dependency


✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 7K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 533 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 10 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

CodeBurn is a local TUI dashboard for tracking AI coding token usage and costs across various AI tools. It provides detailed breakdowns of spending by task, model, project, and provider, helping developers understand and optimize their AI expenses without sending any data externally.

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

✅ Categorization by genre
✅ Links to game websites

This repository is a curated list of open-source video games and open-source remakes of commercial games. It categorizes games by genre, providing links to their websites and source code repositories.

𝗔𝗖𝗧𝗜𝗩𝗘𝗣𝗜𝗘𝗖𝗘𝗦 | AI-powered workflow automation and integration, serving as an open-source, self-hostable alternative to platforms like Zapier.  📈 Growing!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: AI-powered workflow automation and integration, serving as an open-source, self-hostable alternative to platforms like Zapier.
📅 Created: Dec 2022 • Updated: May 2026

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Extensible through a type-safe pieces framework in TypeScript
✅ Open ecosystem with community-contributed pieces available on npmjs.com
✅ AI-First: Native AI pieces and AI SDK for building agents and workflows
✅ Enterprise-Ready: Self-hosted, customizable branding, and role-based access
✅ Secure by Design: Self-hosted and network-gapped
✅ Human in the Loop: Features for delayed execution and approval
✅ Human Input Interfaces: Chat and Form interfaces for user interaction
✅ Builder Features: Loops, branches, auto-retries, HTTP, code execution (NPM), versioned flows, customizable templates
✅ Over 200 supported integrations


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 22.4K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 3.7K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 309 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Activepieces is an open-source, self-hosted workflow automation platform designed to be extensible through a type-safe TypeScript framework. It allows users to build AI-powered workflows and integrations, acting as an alternative to services like Zapier, with a strong focus on community contributions and an AI-first approach.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/activepieces/activepieces

𝗡𝗧𝗙𝗬 | Sending instant, scriptable push notifications to personal devices without requiring complex setup or third-party accounts.  🔥 Super Hot!

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Sending instant, scriptable push notifications to personal devices without requiring complex setup or third-party accounts.
📅 Created: Oct 2021 • Updated: May 2026

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ HTTP-based pub-sub notification service
✅ Send notifications to phone/desktop via scripts
✅ No sign-up or fees required for basic usage
✅ Self-hostable open-source service
✅ Open-source Android and iOS apps available
✅ Free hosted service at ntfy.sh


┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 30.4K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1.3K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 356 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

ntfy is an open-source, HTTP-based pub-sub notification service that allows users to send push notifications to their phones or desktops from any script or computer without sign-up or fees. It provides a free hosted service at ntfy.sh and also offers open-source Android and iOS apps.

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉
